global.description: The ad features a vibrant teal background with abstract shapes and clear text elements promoting a weekend escape.
global.main_message: Promoting special weekend fares for travel.

elements.label: teal background
elements.description: A solid teal background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: central shapes
elements.description: A large square and a circular shape are centered, overlapping slightly, creating a modern abstract design.

elements.label: overlapping shapes
elements.description: A smaller circular shape overlaps with the main square, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: abstract shape
elements.description: An irregular abstract shape is positioned towards the left, enhancing the visual interest.

elements.label: additional shape
elements.description: Another rectangular shape is placed centrally, contributing to the layered look of the ad.

elements.label: logo icon
elements.description: A small logo icon is positioned at the top left corner, representing the brand.

elements.label: headline text
elements.description: The text 'HorizonHop UGC' is prominently displayed at the top, bold and eye-catching.

elements.label: body text
elements.description: The phrase 'Escape this weekend' is written in a clear, modern font, positioned centrally.

elements.label: special fares text
elements.description: The text 'Special fares today' is placed below the headline, providing additional context.

elements.label: price tag
elements.description: The price '€29.99' is displayed prominently at the bottom, drawing attention to the offer.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Special fares today

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: The button 'Try for free' is positioned at the bottom, inviting users to take action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, modern abstract with bold text, key elements include shapes and promotional text.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text in the center, with the price and CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: HorizonHop UGC, Escape this weekend, Special fares today, €29.99, Try for free
